media_type.name: Signalgrid
media_type.description:
Signalgrid Push Notifications.
1. Add your Client Key to the User Media "Send to" field. 2. Define the channel via {$SIGNALGRID_CHANNEL} macro.
Visit https://github.com/signalgridco/signalgrid-zabbix for documentation.

message_template.subject: Problem: {EVENT.NAME}
Resolved: {EVENT.NAME}
Updated problem: {EVENT.NAME}
Discovery: {DISCOVERY.DEVICE.STATUS} {DISCOVERY.DEVICE.IPADDRESS}
Autoregistration: {HOST.HOST}
